visual: Horse stance with both hands tracing mirrored spiraling circles in front of the torso, driven by continuous waist rotation.
motion_description: From a wide stance, the practitioner performs a slow, continuous lateral sequence driven by subtle torso rotation and a side-to-side weight shift. Both arms trace large mirrored circles, starting near the lower abdomen and sweeping wide outward and upward to just above shoulder height as the weight transfers onto the right leg. The hands then spiral inward, converging in front of the upper chest and face, before pressing smoothly down the vertical centerline to the lower abdomen as the weight returns to the left leg.
